target: 6. Slipping into the Darkness
(Her body is glowing! It's the same as when Totsumura-san's Shadow was born...!)
(But... for now there's no sign of her chasing us...?)
(Could it be she can't move in that state...? If so!)
Totsumura-san, run!!
Eh!? O-Ooh!
*Pant* *pant*... What was that guy!? Its body was glowing so much!
Probably... it was giving birth to a new Shadow. Something similar happened before...
The story you were telling me, Shinpei-kun... It really was true, huh...
Anyway, let's run for now! Before that thing chases after us――
*Pant*, *pant*, *pant*...
T-Totsumura-san?
No good... I can't run anymore...
...But if we don't run, the Shadow will!
I know. But impossible is impossible...
I understand. But if we can't run away, we should hide somewhere...
The police station... won't work, huh.
Probably not... They might already have it surrounded.
Besides... I want to avoid getting anyone else involved as much as possible, so let's avoid places with people.
Isn't it the other way around? If we're in a crowd, Mio-cha... no, that thing won't attack us, right?
That might have been true up until now.
But things are different now... probably.
(The second time... when I was killed by Mio――)
(At that time, Mio maintained a cautious stance, fearing the risk of the gunshot sound.)
(In other words, that means having their existence revealed carries some kind of risk for Mio and the others.)
Shinpei-kun, don't just stay quiet, say something!
It's hard to explain, but…
Shadow Mio had been acting cautiously so their existence wouldn't be revealed.
Despite that, she suddenly appeared in front of us today.
So… what does that mean?
I'm saying that a situation has occurred where they had no choice but to appear before us, even if it meant taking that kind of risk.
An inconvenient situation for Shadow Mio and the others...
If that's the case, then it's bad if we're around other people!
That's exactly what I'm saying.
Anyway, let's get away from town.
Yes, let's find a place to hide.
Owowow... damn it! I can't even walk properly in the middle of the forest this late at night...
I still don't see the Shadow. Let's hide while we have the chance.
Yeah. Then, in the shadow of those bushes...
Why... did things end up like this...
Anyway, for now, let's just think about how to escape...
We can't just stay hidden like this forever, either...
You're right... But backup from the mainland should arrive in the morning. If we wait for that――
No, that's bad.
...W-Why!?
That Shadow from earlier... there's a possibility it copied either you or me, Totsumura-san.
If the one that was copied was you, Totsumura-san...
...Then?
Even if the backup detectives come, that fake... Shadow Totsumura-san might sweet-talk them into going back to the mainland...
That's ridiculous!?
Of course, there's also a very good chance that we'll be killed before morning comes.
What the hell are we supposed to do...
(Shadow Mio knows where Kofune is too.)
(But even if we have nowhere to go, just hiding here like this is...)
(If only we had something to protect ourselves with, at least...)
Something to protect ourselves…
Why are you staring at me.
Totsumura-san, you have a gun, right?
A gun...? Yeah, I have one, but...
Wait, no! I can't do that!!
If I use this thing here, I won't get off with just a written apology!
Totsumura-san, calm down!
If the one copied was you, Totsumura-san... That means the enemy has a gun too, you know?
(In the previous loop, Shadow Mio borrowed a gun from Shadow Totsumura-san...)
(It's better to assume that the copied Shadow has everything the original person had.)
There's no guarantee anywhere that we can escape until morning like this.
Besides, even if we manage to escape until morning, as long as we don't eliminate the fundamental threat, the danger won't end.
The fundamental… threat?
Yes... the fundamental threat. As long as we don't do something about that Shadow, we'll constantly be targeted!
When you think about it that way... Don't you think we have no choice but to prepare ourselves?
They are monsters who don't hesitate at all to kill people.
(Even when she killed me... Shadow Mio's expression didn't change at all.)
So…
Kill or be killed... is that it?
Yes, there's a lot we don't know about the Shadows, but...
Seeing as they use things like kitchen knives, I'm thinking their physical abilities aren't much different from humans.
If the Shadow has a gun, they will use it without hesitation. Therefore...
If it comes down to it, we have no choice but to fight.
To survive... And to protect the people of the island...
To protect... the people of the island...
You're right... I'm a hero of justice.
Protecting everyone on the island is my job.
For Erika-chan's sake too, I'm gonna do this!
Let's do it! We'll fight and protect everyone!
Ooh, let's do this!
